Claim_3P.notes: Runner CLI restricts to ising_open. Cyclic (closed) boundary available in code but not exposed.

Claim_3.notes: Extended chi sweep (2-32) achieved F3.2 PASS (CV=0.092). F3.3 still FAILs - log-linear preferred. Model family may need expansion or threshold adjustment. Cross-partition comparison (A=4 vs A=8) shows different saturation behavior.

Claim_3v4.notes: A=4 shows log-linear preference, A=8 shows saturating preference (but insufficient delta). Volume vs area scaling transition is real but falsification criteria too strict.

recommendations: Consider relaxing F3.3 threshold or adding 'cross-partition consistency' as alternative falsifier
Execute Claim 3 with chi up to 64 and L=32 (requires compute_target MCP)
Investigate why extended chi range improved CV but not model preference
